name: Deadzone Haunt
short_description: Deadzone Haunt is a wave-based First-Person Zombie Shooter. Customize your loadout, upgrade weapons, and use perks & power-ups to dominate the demons. Experience smooth movement, satisfying gunplay, and a new approach to weapon camo customization.
detailed_description:
Deadzone Haunt is a wave-based First-Person Zombie Shooter. Customize your loadout, upgrade weapons, and use perks & power-ups to dominate the demons. Experience smooth movement, satisfying gunplay, and a new approach to weapon camo customization.

Features

6 Game Modes

Deadzone Haunt offers six exciting game modes to keep gameplay fresh and challenging. Survive endless waves in Classic, push your limits in the intense 10 Rounds mode, or face the tension of Battle Royale, where a shrinking gas zone keeps the pressure high. Perked Up starts you off with all perks unlocked. For different challenges, try the Easy or Extreme modes designed to suit varying skill levels.

7 Maps

Fight through seven uniquely designed maps, each with its own atmosphere and tactical opportunities. Battle zombies in the Bowling Alley, cross the rain-soaked Bridge, explore the Art Gallery, or survive the snowy Winter Village. Take on the abandoned Private Golf Villa, fight your way through the Prison, or defend the Airbase Hangar.

11 Weapons

Choose from 11 different weapons including shotguns, assault rifles, SMGs, pistols, full-auto pistols, and melee weapons to fit your playstyle. Upgrade them and blast through the zombie hordes.

10 Perks & 4 Power-Ups

Customize your strategy with 10 unique perks like faster reload, increased fire rate, and extra health, plus 4 powerful power-ups to help you survive the fight.

10.5 Million Camo Variations (Camo Mixing)

Setting a new standard in FPS games, the Camo Mixing Tool lets you combine three different camos and fully customize the pattern and brightness. This opens up over 10 million unique combinations to make your weapons truly your own.

Gamepad Support

Deadzone Haunt supports both controllers and mouse & keyboard, delivering a true FPS experience on controller with customizable deadzones, optional aim assist, optimized aim response curves for smooth control, separate sensitivity settings for regular and ADS aiming, plus full button remapping to tailor controls to your preference.

Made by a gamer, for gamers.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
